description: Searches Amazon by keywords and returns product list data (ASIN, title, price, rating, etc.) for US, UK, DE, FR, JP. Results can be filtered by rating, reviews, and sponsored; optional detail-page fetch for category and features.

properties.title: Keywords
properties.name: keywords
properties.description: Search terms, e.g. iphone case, usb c hub. One or more keywords.

properties.title: Max items per keyword
properties.name: max_items_per_keyword
properties.description: Maximum products to scrape per keyword (1–500).

properties.title: Min rating
properties.name: min_rating
properties.description: Filter out products with lower rating; 0 = no filter.

properties.title: Min reviews
properties.name: min_reviews
properties.description: Filter out products with fewer reviews; 0 = no filter.

properties.title: Fetch detail pages
properties.name: fetch_details
properties.description: Open product detail pages for first N items to get category path and feature bullets.

properties.title: Max detail items per keyword
properties.name: max_detail_items
properties.description: Max products to open detail page for when Fetch detail pages is on (1–50).
